---
title: &TITLE Pablo Esteban Uribe Herrera
last: Uribe
first: Pablo
people_group: understudent
email: "ruesaint.severin@gmail.com"
education:
  - Undergraduate Biology student | FES Iztacala
subtitle: Undergraduate Student
description: ""
bio: "I am an undergraduate Biology student from FES Iztacala, UNAM. I am in the process of obtaining my Bsc degree as a member of the Paleogenomics and Evolutionary Biology group at LIIGH, under the supervision of Dr. Federico Sánchez Quinto. My Bsc thesis focuses on the phylogenetic relationships of the late Pleistocene horses at the Santa Lucia archeological site, at the new International Airport “Felipe Angeles”. I have training on bioinformatics and wet lab paleogenomics, as well as palentological techniques and histological processing. My research focuses on better understanding the systematics and evolutionary history of pleistocene extinct megafauna of México through the ancient DNA and the integration of morphological data into molecular phylogenies. My work focuses primarily on horses, but I am also collaborating in projects with other taxa."
image: avatar.jpg

# Group publications
listing:
  - id: group-pubs
    template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
    contents: 
      - "../../publications/**/*.qmd"
      - "!../../publications/_template/"
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    filter-ui: true
    include:
      author: *TITLE
    fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

  - id: personal-pubs
    template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
    contents: 
      - "../../personal_publications/**/*.qmd"
      - "!../../personal_publications/_template/"
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    filter-ui: true
    include:
      author: *TITLE
    fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

page-layout: full # La página se muestra en ancho completo.
about: 
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round # imagen redonda
  image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:ruesaint.severin@gmail.com
---

<hr>

:::: {#about}
## Education

{{< meta education >}}

## Description

::: {style="text-align: justify;"}
{{< meta bio >}}
:::

<br>
::::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

::: {#group-pubs}
:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Personal Publications

::: {#personal-pubs}
:::
